name: Black Forest Cheesecake Delight
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the chocolate chips.
2. Combine crumbs and melted margarine, pressing onto the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
4. In a mixing bowl, combine cream cheese and sugar. Mix until well blended.
5. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition.
6. Blend in chocolate extract; pour over the crust.
7. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
8. Loosen the cake from the rim of the pan and cool before removing the rim.
9. Chill thoroughly.
10. Top cheesecake with pie filling and whipped topping just before serving.
